## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Hotfix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Release prep
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Config or CI change

## Risk area

- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Entitlements
- [ ] StoreKit
- [ ] Privacy
- [ ] Draft persistence
- [ ] Panic hide
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Receipts
- [ ] OCR
- [ ] AI
- [ ] Account deletion
- [ ] App Store build
- [ ] Other

## TDD evidence

RED command:

RED failure reason:

GREEN command:

Full verification command:

Coverage result:

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No tests weakened
- [ ] No skipped tests added
- [ ] No `.only` committed
- [ ] No coverage thresholds lowered
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No private Note text added to logs or analytics
- [ ] No direct main push
- [ ] Rollback impact considered

## Release impact

- [ ] Safe for develop
- [ ] Requires release branch
- [ ] Requires hotfix branch
- [ ] Requires App Store review
- [ ] Requires migration plan
- [ ] Requires rollback plan
